name: Dr Randa Alami
title: Lecturer in Economics
biography: She specializes in teaching Middle Eastern political economy, finance, and energy transition issues. She has published about external debt and military spending in MENA. Having worked on inclusive growth, poverty and inequality in MENA, her research interests moved to social policy and social protection.
research_interests: Middle East; Finance; Indebtedness; Social Policy; Justice; Gender; Health; Poverty; Inequality
